name: Doubao-1.5-Pro
note: MoE flagship matching GPT-4o/Claude 3.5 Sonnet at far lower cost; adds a Deep Thinking mode that beats o1-preview on AIME

results.notes: SuperGPQA 'Overall (sample)' score for Doubao-1.5-pro-32k-250115 (chat-model category, zero-shot, temperature=0), from the independent SuperGPQA benchmark paper (M-A-P / Doubao Seed team et al., Table in Section 4.2, arXiv:2502.14739).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: released Jan 22 2025 (Gigazine and others), pricing $0.11/$0.275 per 1M tokens and 32K-256K context both literally confirmed on the MarkTechPost article. Active params 20B (~140B-dense-equivalent, 7 experts/token) also confirmed there. The 200B TOTAL-parameter figure is not stated in the MarkTechPost launch article itself — it traces to ByteDance Seed's own arXiv paper (2504.13914, Seed1.5-Thinking / 'Seed-Thinking-v1.5'), which discloses 20B activated / 200B total for the MoE reasoning model underlying Doubao's Deep Thinking mode, and is corroborated by multiple secondary write-ups (aibase.com, rosywheel.com) explicitly attributing 200B/20B to 'Doubao 1.5 Deep Thinking'. Updated specSources.paramsB to point to the primary arXiv disclosure rather than the launch article.
